output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?member ?memberLabel WHERE {
  ?member wdt:P463 wd:Q22019 .
  ?member rdfs:label ?memberLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?memberLabel) = 'en')
}
output.answer: The Rolling Stones band members are: Mick Jagger, Keith Richards, Charlie Watts, Ronnie Wood, Bill Wyman, Brian Jones, Ian Stewart.
